en: Huh. / Oh.
notes: 軽い驚きや関心。"Huh." は抑揚で意味が変わる

en: Oh, I see. / Is that so.
notes: "I see." が最も汎用的。"Really?" より控えめ

en: Seriously? / For real? / No way.
notes: "For real?" はカジュアル。"Seriously?" はやや強い驚き

en: No way. / You're kidding.
notes: "You're joking." でも同じ意味

en: That's amazing. / That's awesome.
notes: "awesome" はアメリカ英語で非常に多用される

en: Nice. / That's cool.
notes: "Nice." は万能。一言で反応する時に最適

en: That's good to hear. / I'm glad.
notes: "Glad to hear that." もよく使う

en: That sounds rough. / That must have been tough.
notes: "must have been" で相手の経験への共感を示す

en: I get that. / I know, right?
notes: "I feel you." はさらにカジュアル

en: I can see that. / I kind of get it.
notes: "kind of" で「なんとなく」のニュアンスを出す

en: True. / Good point. / Fair enough.
notes: "True." が最もカジュアルで頻出

en: I see. / That makes sense.
notes: "Makes sense." だけでもよく使う

en: That's surprising. / I didn't expect that.
notes: "I wouldn't have guessed." でさらに強調

en: That's interesting. / That's funny.
notes: interesting =「興味深い」、funny =「おかしい」。日本語の「面白い」は両方カバーするので注意

en: That's funny. / That made me laugh.
notes: テキストでは "lol" (laugh out loud)

en: That's a problem. / That's tricky.
notes: "That's tricky." はやや軽いニュアンス

en: That's rough. / That's harsh.
notes: "rough" は状況がつらい時、"harsh" は厳しい時

en: Good for you. / That's great.
notes: "Good for you." は言い方次第で皮肉にもなるので注意

en: I'm jealous. / Lucky you.
notes: "I'm so jealous!" はカジュアルに使える。英語では嫉妬をオープンに言う

en: I didn't know that. / I had no idea.
notes: "I had no idea." のほうが驚きが強い

en: That scared me. / I was shocked. / That caught me off guard.
notes: 物理的に驚いた→ "scared"、内容に驚いた→ "shocked"

en: That makes sense. / Yeah, that checks out.
notes: "That checks out." はカジュアルな「つじつまが合う」

en: Yeah, maybe. / You might be right.
notes: "You might be right." は相手に同意しかけている時

en: I'm curious about that. / That's intriguing.
notes: "intriguing" は "interesting" よりやや知的な響き

jp: それはちょっと嫌だね。
en: That sucks. / That's annoying.
notes: "That sucks." は非常にカジュアルだがよく使う

en: That's a relief. / Oh good.
notes: "What a relief." で「ほっとした」を強調

en: That's too bad. / That's a shame.
notes: "shame" は「恥」ではなく「残念」の意味

en: I totally get that. / I can really relate.
notes: "relate" =「共感する」。"That's so relatable." もSNSで頻出

en: And then? / So?
notes: "So?" は言い方次第で冷たく聞こえるので注意

en: What happened? / How did it go?
notes: "How did it go?" は結果を聞く時に便利

en: Really? / Are you serious?
notes: "Really?" は抑揚で驚き・疑い・確認すべて表現可能

en: No way. / You can't be serious.
notes: "No way!" は驚きの定番

en: That's the best. / That's awesome.
notes: "That's sick." は若者スラングで「最高」

en: That's really helpful. / That's nice of them.
notes: 人に対して→ "That's nice of you/them."

jp: それはちょっとショック。
en: That's kind of shocking. / I wasn't expecting that.
notes: "kind of" で衝撃を和らげる

en: Does that even happen? / How is that possible?
notes: 信じがたい時の反応

en: That's hilarious. / That's so funny.
notes: "hilarious" は "funny" より強い

en: That's a nice story. / That's sweet.
notes: "sweet" は「いい話」「心温まる」のニュアンス

en: That's the key point. / That's important.
notes: "That's the thing." =「そこがポイント」
